mapper.select: SELECT id, document_id AS documentId, source_type AS sourceType, source_id AS sourceId, title, content, visibility_scope AS visibilityScope, metadata_json AS metadataJson, chunk_index AS chunkIndex, chunk_count AS chunkCount, (1 - VEC_DISTANCE_COSINE(VEC_FromText(embedding_text), VEC_FromText(#{queryEmbedding}))) AS similarity FROM ai_knowledge_document WHERE index_name = #{indexName} AND visibility_scope = #{visibilityScope} AND embedding_text IS NOT NULL AND embedding_text != '' AND VEC_DISTANCE_COSINE(VEC_FromText(embedding_text), VEC_FromText(#{queryEmbedding})) <= #{distanceThreshold} ORDER BY similarity DESC, last_sync_time DESC LIMIT #{topK}

SELECT id, index_name AS indexName, document_id AS documentId, source_type AS sourceType, source_id AS sourceId, title, content, visibility_scope AS visibilityScope, metadata_json AS metadataJson, chunk_index AS chunkIndex, chunk_count AS chunkCount, content_hash AS contentHash, embedding_text AS embeddingText, sync_status AS syncStatus, last_error AS lastError, last_sync_time AS lastSyncTime, create_time AS createTime, update_time AS updateTime FROM ai_knowledge_document WHERE index_name = #{indexName} AND document_id = #{documentId} AND chunk_index BETWEEN #{startChunkIndex} AND #{endChunkIndex} ORDER BY chunk_index ASC

SELECT MIN(id) AS id, index_name AS indexName, document_id AS documentId, source_type AS sourceType, source_id AS sourceId, title, visibility_scope AS visibilityScope, MAX(sync_status) AS syncStatus, MAX(last_error) AS lastError, MAX(last_sync_time) AS lastSyncTime FROM ai_knowledge_document WHERE index_name = #{indexName} AND visibility_scope = #{visibilityScope} GROUP BY index_name, document_id, source_type, source_id, title, visibility_scope ORDER BY lastSyncTime DESC LIMIT #{limit}
